description: 6.5 Creedmoor 140gr Hornady ELD-M, G7 BC = 0.326 lb/in², MV = 2710 fps, 100 yd zero, 1.7 in scope height, ICAO standard atmosphere (59°F, 29.921 inHg, 0% RH).
note: Ground truth derived from @aim/solver itself (dist build). Tolerances are tighter than the production 0.05-mil gate; if future solver changes break these values, the fixture must be regenerated from an external reference (py-ballisticcalc, JBM, or Hornady 4DOF). This serves as a regression baseline — any change that shifts output by >1" at 1000 yd warrants review.
